system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_order_getall3","body":"
CREATE   PROC TR_ORDER_GETALL3 (@year int)
AS
BEGIN
	-- Table0: Danh sách đơn hàng
	SELECT A.id, A.customer, B.customer_name, A.cust_po_number, A.order_number, A.[range], A.fsc_id, C.fsc_name,
		A.ncc_phoi, A.ncc_dinhhinh, A.ncc_son,
		A.cont_qty,
		A.order_date, 
		A.ship_date,
		COALESCE(A.target_date, A.ship_date) AS target_date, 
		A.actual_date, 
		A.kehoach_hangtrang,
		ngaychenhlech = CASE WHEN A.actual_date IS NOT NULL AND A.target_date IS NOT NULL THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, A.actual_date, A.target_date) END,
		A.remark, A.remark2,
		A.danhgia, A.trangthai_donhang,
		COALESCE(A.SortOrder, A.id) as SortOrder
	FROM tr_order A
	LEFT JOIN tr_khachhang B ON A.customer = B.customer_id
	LEFT JOIN tr_tinhtrang_fsc C ON A.fsc_id = C.fsc_id
	WHERE (YEAR(COALESCE(A.target_date, A.ship_date)) = @year OR YEAR(A.order_date) = @year OR YEAR(A.actual_date) = @year) 
		AND A.f_cancelled = 'N'
		AND A.IsExample = 0
	ORDER BY COALESCE(A.SortOrder, A.id)

	-- Table1: Số lượng cont theo tháng	
	SELECT 'ORDER_DATE' AS groupCode, N'Số cont tiếp nhận' AS groupName,
		total_cont_qty = SUM(cont_qty),
		t1 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(order_date) = 1 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END),
		t2 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(order_date) = 2 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END),
		t3 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(order_date) = 3 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END),
		t4 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(order_date) = 4 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END),
		t5 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(order_date) = 5 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END),
		t6 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(order_date) = 6 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END),
		t7 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(order_date) = 7 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END),
		t8 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(order_date) = 8 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END),
		t9 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(order_date) = 9 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END),
		t10 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(order_date) = 10 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END),
		t11 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(order_date) = 11 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END),
		t12 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(order_date) = 12 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END)
	FROM tr_order
	WHERE YEAR(order_date) = @year AND f_cancelled = 'N' AND IsExample = 0
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 'SHIP_DATE' AS groupCode, N'Số cont xuất theo mục tiêu',
		total_cont_qty = SUM(cont_qty),
		t1 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(ship_date) = 1 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END),
		t2 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(ship_date) = 2 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END),
		t3 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(ship_date) = 3 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END),
		t4 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(ship_date) = 4 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END),
		t5 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(ship_date) = 5 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END),
		t6 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(ship_date) = 6 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END),
		t7 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(ship_date) = 7 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END),
		t8 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(ship_date) = 8 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END),
		t9 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(ship_date) = 9 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END),
		t10 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(ship_date) = 10 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END),
		t11 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(ship_date) = 11 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END),
		t12 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(ship_date) = 12 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END)
	FROM tr_order
	WHERE YEAR(ship_date) = @year AND f_cancelled = 'N' AND IsExample = 0
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 'ACTUAL_DATE' AS groupCode, N'Số cont xuất thực tế',
		total_cont_qty = SUM(cont_qty),
		t1 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(actual_date) = 1 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END),
		t2 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(actual_date) = 2 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END),
		t3 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(actual_date) = 3 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END),
		t4 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(actual_date) = 4 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END),
		t5 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(actual_date) = 5 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END),
		t6 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(actual_date) = 6 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END),
		t7 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(actual_date) = 7 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END),
		t8 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(actual_date) = 8 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END),
		t9 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(actual_date) = 9 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END),
		t10 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(actual_date) = 10 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END),
		t11 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(actual_date) = 11 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END),
		t12 = SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(actual_date) = 12 THEN cont_qty ELSE 0 END)
	FROM tr_order
	WHERE YEAR(actual_date) = @year AND f_cancelled = 'N' AND IsExample = 0
END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_khachhang","dbo.tr_order","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc"],"writesTables":[],"flags":[],"suggestedTier":"B"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
